economic_notes: TteS operates multiple government business enterprises including Kamloops Indian Band Development Corporation, Kamloops Indian Band Utility Corporation, Tk'emlupsemc Forestry Development Corporation, Swelaps Market Ltd, and others. Investments in three limited partnerships including forestry, mining royalties, and employment contract services. Property taxation and sales tax revenues are significant own-source revenue streams. Large interest and investment income of $8M in 2024 vs $1.9M in 2023.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED for two reasons: (1) PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations not implemented - management has not completed assessment so impact is unquantifiable; (2) GBEs use ASPE instead of required IFRS. Consolidated entity includes TteS, two Social Housing Section 95 entities, and Spiyu7ullucw Ranch Corporation (with non-coterminous January 31 year-end). Nine GBEs on modified equity basis. Three limited partnerships on modified equity basis. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $15,458,436 + Province of BC $7,942,118 + CMHC $190,686 + Health Canada $194,921 = $23,786,161. Housing expenses combined Housing $2,059,123 + Social Housing $177,615 = $2,236,738. No schedule of remuneration provided in extracted text. Interest and investment income unusually high at $8M vs prior year $1.9M - likely reflects higher interest rates on large cash balances. Large cash and restricted cash balances totaling ~$65M. Deferred revenue is significant at $25.2M.
